message:
feat(encode): Add async encoder module

encode/mod.rs:
- Export new async_encode module
- Maintain sync encoding API

encode/async_encode.rs (new):
- Async streaming encoder for TOON format
- Tokio AsyncWrite support
- Event-by-event encoding for memory efficiency
- Complements async_decode for full async pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
